exploration_notes: The investigation traced a 6-step causal chain across 9 files. When multiple DestinationRules target the same host, mergeDestinationRule() (destination_rule.go:38) merges their specs into a single config.Config via DeepCopy(), which preserves only the first DR's Meta (Name/Namespace). The consolidatedDestRules structure (push_context.go:251) stores only this merged config.
